title: Postfix Templates
description: Custom postfix template definitions for the Postfix Templates Visual Studio extension.

templates.description: An array of custom postfix template definitions.

name.description: The trigger text shown in IntelliSense (e.g., 'log'). Must be unique.

description.description: Description shown in the completion tooltip. Defaults to the name when omitted.

body.description: The output text. Use {expr} as a placeholder for the original expression.

suffix.description: Short text displayed to the right of the completion item in the IntelliSense list. Defaults to 'custom' when omitted.

appliesTo.description: Restricts when the template appears based on the expression type. Defaults to 'any' when omitted.
